messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate an industrial PowerPoint presentation for operations managers in the Logistics industry focusing on supply chain optimization strategies, spanning exactly 14 slides with a bold theme using orange, dark gray, and black accents. Save the file as "Supply_Chain_Optimization.pptx". All content should be written in German using 16:9 Widescreen slide size. Do not use any external APIs or web scraping; rely solely on locally generated placeholder data for logistics metrics. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_STACKED`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Supply_Chain_Optimization.pptx"

ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
BLACK = RGBColor(0x1A, 0x1A, 0x1A)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xE8, 0xE8)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x4D, 0x4D, 0x4D)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
TITLE_SIZE = Pt(36)
SUBTITLE_SIZE = Pt(18)
BODY_SIZE = Pt(14)
CARD_TEXT_SIZE = Pt(12)
FOOTER_SIZE = Pt(10)

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.75)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.4)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.2)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    r = int(hex_color[1:3], 16)
    g = int(hex_color[3:5], 16)
    b = int(hex_color[5:7], 16)
    return RGBColor(r, g, b)


def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=Pt(14),
                 font_color=WHITE, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT,
                 font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = font_size
    run.font.color.rgb = font_color
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text="", body_text=""):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
    shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.1)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.1)

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title_text
    run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = ORANGE
    run_t.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    if body_text:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_b = p_body.add_run()
        run_b.text = body_text
        run_b.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    label_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35),
                                          Inches(1.2), Inches(0.08))
    label_shape.fill.solid()
    label_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    label_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.45), Inches(3), Inches(0.3),
                 text, Pt(12), ORANGE, True)


def add_footer(slide):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.25),
                 "Supply Chain Optimierung | Confidential", FOOTER_SIZE, MEDIUM_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, image_path):
    if os.path.exists(image_path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(image_path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.4), width - Inches(0.4),
                     height - Inches(0.6), "Bildplatzhalter", Pt(12), MEDIUM_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def create_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    # Orange accent line at top
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    # Title
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2),
                 "Supply Chain Optimierung", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.7), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Strategien für effiziente Logistikprozesse und Wettbewerbsvorteile", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    # Company name at bottom
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(1.2), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Operations Management | Logistikabteilung", Pt(16), LIGHT_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    # Bottom accent line
    bottom_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.8),
                                          Inches(2), Inches(0.05))
    bottom_line.fill.solid()
    bottom_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    bottom_line.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide)


def create_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Agenda", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Überblick über die wichtigsten Themen", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    agenda_items = [
        ("01", "Herausforderungen im Supply Chain Management"),
        ("02", "KPI-Dashboard und Leistungskennzahlen"),
        ("03", "Demand Forecasting mit KI-Methoden"),
        ("04", "Bestandsmanagement-Strategien"),
        ("05", "Transporteffizienz und Routenoptimierung"),
        ("06", "Lagerautomatisierung und Robotik"),
    ]

    for i, (num, item) in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y_pos = Inches(1.7) + Inches(i * 0.55)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y_pos, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     num, Pt(28), ORANGE, True)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.7), y_pos - Inches(0.05), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
                     item, Pt(16), LIGHT_GRAY, False)

    # Decorative card on right side
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.2), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.2), Inches(3.5),
             "Zielsetzung",
             "Steigerung der Effizienz um 20%\nReduzierung der Kosten um 15%\nVerbesserung der Liefertreue auf 98%")

    add_footer(slide)


def create_challenges_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Herausforderungen im Supply Chain Management", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Aktuelle Probleme in der Logistikbranche", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    # Three stat cards
    stats = [
        ("30%", "Lagerkosten\nbelasten den Umsatz"),
        ("25%", "Ineffiziente\nTransportprozesse"),
        ("40%", "Fehler in der\nBedarfsvorhersage"),
    ]

    for i, (value, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(i * 3.1)
        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x_pos, Inches(2),
                                             Inches(2.8), Inches(2))
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        card_shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
        card_shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        tf = card_shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p_val = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_v = p_val.add_run()
        run_v.text = value
        run_v.font.size = Pt(42)
        run_v.font.bold = True
        run_v.font.color.rgb = ORANGE

        p_desc = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_d = p_desc.add_run()
        run_d.text = desc
        run_d.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    # Callout box at bottom
    callout = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.5),
                                      Inches(8.6), Inches(0.7))
    callout.fill.solid()
    callout.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    callout.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(4.55), Inches(8), Inches(0.6),
                 "Supply Chain Optimierung ist entscheidend für den langfristigen Wettbewerbsvorteil",
                 Pt(16), WHITE, True)

    add_footer(slide)


def create_kpi_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "KPI-Dashboard", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Schlüsselkennzahlen der Supply Chain Performance", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    kpis = [
        ("Lagerumschlag", "8.5x"),
        ("Auftragsabwicklung", "97%"),
        ("Pünktliche Lieferung", "94%"),
        ("Kosten pro Einheit", "$12.50"),
        ("Kapazitätsauslastung", "82%"),
        ("Lieferantenbewertung", "96%"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(kpis):
        row = i // 3
        col = i % 3
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(col * 3.15)
        y_pos = Inches(1.8) + Inches(row * 1.7)

        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x_pos, y_pos,
                                             Inches(2.9), Inches(1.4))
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        card_shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
        card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = card_shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p_label = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_l = p_label.add_run()
        run_l.text = label
        run_l.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_l.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

        p_value = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_v = p_value.add_run()
        run_v.text = value
        run_v.font.size = Pt(30)
        run_v.font.bold = True
        run_v.font.color.rgb = ORANGE

    # Summary card at bottom
    summary = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.5),
                                      Inches(8.6), Inches(0.7))
    summary.fill.solid()
    summary.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
    summary.line.color.rgb = ORANGE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(4.55), Inches(8), Inches(0.6),
                 "Gesamtersparnis durch Optimierung: €2.3 Mio.", Pt(18), WHITE, True)

    add_footer(slide)


def create_demand_forecasting_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Demand Forecasting", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Fortschrittliche Prognosemethoden für die Logistik", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    body = ("Moderne Supply Chains nutzen fortschrittliche Analytik und Machine-Learning-Modelle,\n"
            "um die Genauigkeit der Bedarfsprognosen signifikant zu verbessern und Lagerbestände\n"
            "zu optimieren. Durch den Einsatz von KI-gestützten Algorithmen können Unternehmen\n"
            "Nachfrageschwankungen besser vorhersagen und ihre Logistikprozesse anpassen.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2), body, BODY_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    stats = [
        ("+35%", "Verbesserung der\nPrognosegenauigkeit"),
        ("-40%", "Reduzierung von\nLagerengpässen"),
        ("-28%", "Senkung der\nFehlmengenkosten"),
    ]

    for i, (value, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(i * 3.15)
        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x_pos, Inches(3.2),
                                             Inches(2.9), Inches(1.8))
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        card_shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE

        tf = card_shape.text_frame
        p_val = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_v = p_val.add_run()
        run_v.text = value
        run_v.font.size = Pt(36)
        run_v.font.bold = True
        run_v.font.color.rgb = ORANGE

        p_desc = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_d = p_desc.add_run()
        run_d.text = desc
        run_d.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    add_footer(slide)


def create_chart_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Prognosevergleich: Traditionell vs. KI", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Genauigkeit der Bedarfsprognosen nach Methode", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = [
        "Lagerumschlag", "Auftragsabwicklung", "Pünktliche Lieferung",
        "Kosten pro Einheit", "Kapazitätsauslastung", "Lieferantenbewertung"
    ]
    chart_data.add_series("Traditionelle Methoden", (65, 78, 70, 60, 72, 68))
    chart_data.add_series("KI-gestützte Prognose", (92, 94, 93, 88, 91, 95))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_STACKED,
        Inches(0.7), Inches(1.6), Inches(8.6), Inches(3.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series1 = plot.series[0]
    series1.format.fill.solid()
    series1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY

    series2 = plot.series[1]
    series2.format.fill.solid()
    series2.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = False
    value_axis.major_gridlines.format.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x3D, 0x3D, 0x3D)
    value_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    value_axis.tick_labels.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    category_axis = chart.category_axis
    category_axis.major_gridlines.format.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x3D, 0x3D, 0x3D)
    category_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    category_axis.tick_labels.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    legend = chart.legend
    legend.font.size = Pt(12)
    legend.font.color.rgb = WHITE

    add_footer(slide)


def create_inventory_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Bestandsmanagement-Strategien", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Optimierung der Lagerbestände für maximale Effizienz", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    body = ("Moderne Bestandsmanagement-Ansätze kombinieren traditionelle Methoden mit\n"
            "fortschrittlicher Analytik, um die Balance zwischen Kosten und Servicelevel\n"
            "zu optimieren. Echtzeit-Daten und prädiktive Modelle ermöglichen eine präzisere\n"
            "Bestandsplanung und reduzieren Überbestände signifikant.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2), body, BODY_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    strategies = [
        ("Just-in-Time (JIT)", "Materialien werden genau\nzum benötigten Zeitpunkt\ngeliefert"),
        ("ABC-Analyse", "Klassifizierung nach Wert\nund Bedeutung für priorisierte\nBestandskontrolle"),
        ("Sicherheitsbestände", "Berechnung optimaler\nPuffermengen basierend auf\nNachfrageschwankungen"),
        ("Bedarfsgetriebene\nWiederauffüllung", "Proaktive Bestellung durch\nprädiktive Analytik und\nEchtzeit-Daten"),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(strategies):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(col * 4.5)
        y_pos = Inches(3.1) + Inches(row * 1.8)

        add_card(slide, x_pos, y_pos, Inches(4.2), Inches(1.6), title, desc)

    add_footer(slide)


def create_transportation_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Transporteffizienz", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Optimierung von Routen und Transportkosten", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    body = ("Logistikunternehmen setzen zunehmend auf fortschrittliche Technologien,\n"
            "um Transportrouten zu optimieren, Kosten zu senken und die\n"
            "Lieferleistung zu verbessern. KI-gestützte Routenplanung reduziert\n"
            "die Fahrzeit um bis zu 20% und den Kraftstoffverbrauch signifikant.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2), body, BODY_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    stats = [
        ("92%", "Ladungsauslastung\nim Durchschnitt"),
        ("-18%", "Ersparnis durch\nRoutenoptimierung"),
        ("-22%", "Reduzierung der\nDurchlaufzeit"),
    ]

    for i, (value, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(i * 3.15)
        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x_pos, Inches(3.2),
                                             Inches(2.9), Inches(1.8))
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        card_shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE

        tf = card_shape.text_frame
        p_val = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_v = p_val.add_run()
        run_v.text = value
        run_v.font.size = Pt(36)
        run_v.font.bold = True
        run_v.font.color.rgb = ORANGE

        p_desc = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_d = p_desc.add_run()
        run_d.text = desc
        run_d.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    # Fourth card
    add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(3.15), Inches(4.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.7),
             "Gesamtkosten pro Meile", "-€0.42 gesenkt")

    add_footer(slide)


def create_warehouse_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))

    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Lagerautomatisierung", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Robotik und KI für moderne Lagerprozesse", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    body = ("Moderne Lagereinrichtungen werden zunehmend durch Robotik und\n"
            "künstliche Intelligenz transformiert. Automatisierte Regalbediengeräte (ASRS)\n"
            "und fahrerlose Transportsysteme (FTS) steigern die Effizienz um bis zu 300%\n"
            "und reduzieren gleichzeitig die Fehlerquote erheblich.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2), body, BODY_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    stats = [
        ("+45%", "ASRS-Adoption\nin Top-Logistikern"),
        ("99.7%", "Picking-Genauigkeit\nmit Automatisierung"),
        ("+300%", "Steigerung der\nDurchsatzleistung"),
    ]

    for i, (value, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(i * 3.15)
        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x_pos, Inches(3.2),
                                             Inches(2.9), Inches(1.8))
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        card_shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE

        tf = card_shape.text_frame
        p_val = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_v = p_val.add_run()
        run_v.text = value
        run_v.font.size = Pt(36)
        run_v.font.bold = True
        run_v.font.color.rgb = ORANGE

        p_desc = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_d = p_desc.add_run()
        run_d.text = desc
        run_d.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    # Fourth card
    add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(3.15), Inches(4.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.7),
             "Arbeitskosten", "-€1.8 Mio./Jahr gespart")

    add_footer(slide)

def create_risk_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),

                 "Risikomanagement", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

                 "Resilienz der Lieferkette als kritische Fähigkeit", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    body = ("Unterbrechungen in der Lieferkette — von Naturkatastrophen über\n"
            "geopolitische Ereignisse bis hin zu Cyberangriffen — erfordern ein\n"
            "proaktives Risikomanagement. Unternehmen müssen ihre Abhängigkeiten\n"
            "verstehen und alternative Beschaffungsstrategien entwickeln.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2), body, BODY_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    risks = [
        ("Operative Risiken", "Maschinenausfälle,\nArbeitskräftemangel,\nQualitätsprobleme"),
        ("Finanzielle Risiken", "Währungsschwankungen,\nRohstoffpreisvolatilität,\nZinsänderungen"),
        ("Umweltrisiken", "Extremwetterereignisse,\nRegulatorische Änderungen,\nKlimawandel"),
        ("Cybersicherheit", "Datenpannen, Ransomware-Angriffe,\nBeeinträchtigung sensibler\nLogistikdaten"),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(risks):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(col * 4.5)
        y_pos = Inches(3.1) + Inches(row * 1.8)

        add_card(slide, x_pos, y_pos, Inches(4.2), Inches(1.6), title, desc)

    add_footer(slide)

                 "Phasenansatz für die Optimierung der Supply Chain", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    body = ("Eine erfolgreiche Transformation erfordert einen strukturierten Ansatz\n"
            "mit klaren Phasen und Meilensteinen. Von der Analyse des Ist-Zustands\n"
            "bis zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung — jeder Schritt ist entscheidend.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2), body, BODY_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    phases = [
        ("Phase 1: Bewertung", "Ist-Zustandsanalyse,\nIdentifikation von Lücken,\nPriorisierung der Möglichkeiten"),
        ("Phase 2: Planung", "Lösungsarchitektur,\nVendor-Auswahl,\nProjektplanung"),
        ("Phase 3: Umsetzung", "Pilotprojekte,\nVollständige Implementierung,\nSchulung des Personals"),
        ("Phase 4: Optimierung", "Kontinuierliche Verbesserung,\nSkalierung der Lösungen,\nPerformance-Monitoring"),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(phases):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(col * 4.5)
        y_pos = Inches(3.1) + Inches(row * 1.8)

        add_card(slide, x_pos, y_pos, Inches(4.2), Inches(1.6), title, desc)

    add_footer(slide)


def create_closing_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0),
                                          SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.12))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Vielen Dank für Ihre Aufmerksamkeit", TITLE_SIZE, WHITE, True)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.2), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Supply Chain Optimierung — Gemeinsam zur Zukunft der Logistik", SUBTITLE_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    body = ("Wir freuen uns auf den Austausch mit Ihnen über die Umsetzung\n"
            "dieser Strategien in Ihrem Unternehmen.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.0), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.0), body, BODY_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    contacts = [
        ("E-Mail", "kontakt@logistik-optimierung.de"),
        ("Telefon", "+49 30 12345678"),
        ("Website", "www.logistik-optimierung.de"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(contacts):
        x_pos = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(i * 3.15)
        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x_pos, Inches(3.4),
                                             Inches(2.9), Inches(1.0))
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        card_shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE

        tf = card_shape.text_frame
        p_label = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_l = p_label.add_run()
        run_l.text = label
        run_l.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_l.font.bold = True
        run_l.font.color.rgb = ORANGE

        p_value = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_v = p_value.add_run()
        run_v.text = value
        run_v.font.size = Pt(14)
        run_v.font.color.rgb = WHITE

    add_footer(slide)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    create_title_slide(prs)
    create_agenda_slide(prs)
    create_challenges_slide(prs)
    create_kpi_slide(prs)
    create_demand_forecasting_slide(prs)
    create_chart_slide(prs)
    create_inventory_slide(prs)
    create_transportation_slide(prs)
    create_warehouse_slide(prs)
    create_supplier_slide(prs)
    create_risk_slide(prs)
    create_technology_slide(prs)
    create_roadmap_slide(prs)
    create_closing_slide(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
